source: dmg sheet rows 15-18 (Brandish), range calculator D7 (mastery). Split from hero.json for correct weapon speed modeling. Brandish is 1 slash + 1 stab per attack (https://royals.ms/forum/threads/heros-damage-stability.200652/, https://royals.ms/forum/threads/warrior-2h-weapon-balancing.163124/). Combo multiplier 1.9x confirmed via in-game testing — see skill-library.md discrepancy note.
